text:
REGIME — Risk-on, small caps led, software surged, staples lagged.

INDICES — VIX 19.1, falling. IWM +1.44%, QQQ +1.03%, SPY +0.98%, DIA +0.60%, small caps outperformed large caps across the board. USO surged +2.92% on US-Iran deal discussions, the standout cross-asset move.

SECTORS — XLK +2.10%, XLF +1.75%, XLY +0.91%, XLC +0.76%, XLI +0.71%, XLRE +0.47%, XLV +0.45%, XLB +0.44%, XLE +0.30%, XLP -1.00%, XLU -1.21%. Top industries: WGMI +5.85% and WCLD +5.44%; bottom: SLV -1.16% and XLU -1.21%.

THE 7s — Software +5.46%, Cloud +4.61%, Toll Road +2.76%, New Metals +2.65%, Medtech +2.11%, Insurance +2.01%, Semi +1.91%, Buildout +1.59%, New Staples +1.55%, Bank +1.18%, Mag +1.02%, Defense +1.00%, Fab +0.78%, Housing +0.72%, Industrial +0.42%, Energy +0.37%, Health +0.20%, Freight +0.09%, Power -0.59%, Old Staples -0.88%, Old Metals -0.91%. Strongest ticker in Software: ORCL +11%. Weakest in Old Metals: SLV -1.16%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, 2026; CME holds 100% probability of a hold. Fed tally: 6 hawks, 5 neutral, 4 doves. USD Liquidity Stress composite 54/100 (Elevated); most-stressed component is Reserve Scarcity at 80th percentile, with CP-Tbill Spread also elevated at 79th percentile. ON-RRP sits near zero at $0.2B; TGA fell $99.3B.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 60.6, Greed. Top movers: ORCL +11% (Software), Salesforce +4.76% (Software), NOW +7.30% (Software). 20d momentum best sector: XLK +6.57%; worst: XLP -3.22%. Best basket 20d: Semi +22.48%; worst: Software -10.88%. ORCL surged 11% after TSMC's strong results lifted risk sentiment across tech.

WATCH — ORCL today +11%: breakout on volume warrants confirmation or fade watch at prior resistance near $150. NET today negative amid cybersecurity sector pressure: trend divergence vs. broad tech rally flags potential catch-up or continued underperformance. LIT +2.72% on 3x average volume: vol spike with New Metals basket +2.65% on 20d momentum of +11.43% worth monitoring for continuation.
